data.contact_headline: Relentless Builder of What Matters | Strategic Tech Executive | AI & IoT Leader | 3x Exited Founder | TEDx Speaker | $50M+ Impact | Former Mayor | Media Contributor (Fox, CNN) | Dad & IRONMAN
data.conversation_latest_content:
Appreciate the connection again, Vrijen.

The words I’ve been hearing a lot from CEOs going into 2026:
Pressure. Crazy. Uncertain. Downturn. Rebuild.

In my work with companies this past year, the path has been:
Stabilize → Normalize → Strategize.

If that resonates, I’d be glad to share what’s actually working across the board — leadership, ops, AI integration, client retention, whatever’s top of mind.

Here’s my calendar to make it easy — pick the best day and time that works for you:
👉 https://calendar.app.google/avTHxMEHzqdoEGTs8

Hope to chat soon.
— Ryan
